## Affected Files

## Definition of Done

- [ ] The task is implemented.
- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Lint and formatting pass.
- [ ] The diff stays minimal.

## Success Metrics

- The task can be completed without extra clarification.
- The result is reproducible in this repository.
- The change does not introduce avoidable scope creep.

## Validation / Testing

- [ ] Run the targeted test or smoke path.
- [ ] Run the repository validation gate.
- [ ] Record any benchmark or reproducibility evidence if relevant.
